neighbors.name: Murrieta Javier & Janice Bowman
neighbors.claims: Javier Murrieta and Janice Bowman jointly own a parcel of land in Polk County (ID #17994) ([propertytaxrecords.georgiaofficialrecords.com](https://propertytaxrecords.georgiaofficialrecords.com/county/polk#:~:text=The%20Polk%20County%20Tax%20Assessor,Sales%20history%20information)). Bowman’s primary address is listed in Piedmont, Alabama, indicating they reside out of state while owning property in Polk County ([nationalpublicdata.com](https://nationalpublicdata.com/people/b/janice-bowman/#:~:text=192%20County%20Road%20306%2C%20Piedmont%2C,AL%2C%2036272%20Current)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage via formal communication (letters/calls) since they live out-of-area. Emphasize that the project will not harm their property’s value or impose burdens on their ownership.

neighbors.name: White Elmont & Geraldine
neighbors.claims: Elmont White and his wife Geraldine are listed as owners of Polk County parcel #12983 ([propertytaxrecords.georgiaofficialrecords.com](https://propertytaxrecords.georgiaofficialrecords.com/county/polk#:~:text=The%20Polk%20County%20Tax%20Assessor,Sales%20history%20information)). The White family has lived in Polk County for decades, but no public records show them taking any active role in local development debates ([www.alvismillerfuneralhome.com](https://www.alvismillerfuneralhome.com/obituaries/ernest-albert-white#:~:text=He%20was%20born%20in%20Rockmart%2C,enjoyed%20watching%20western%20movies%20and)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Build rapport through a personal, respectful approach (possibly via mutual community contacts). Emphasize considerations like preserving the quiet rural character and addressing any practical concerns they may have.

neighbors.name: Taylor William L & Angela
neighbors.claims: William L. Taylor and Angela Taylor jointly own Polk County parcel #22167 ([propertytaxrecords.georgiaofficialrecords.com](https://propertytaxrecords.georgiaofficialrecords.com/county/polk#:~:text=The%20Polk%20County%20Tax%20Assessor,Sales%20history%20information)). No available public information indicates that either of the Taylors holds any official position or has spoken out about local development proposals ([propertytaxrecords.georgiaofficialrecords.com](https://propertytaxrecords.georgiaofficialrecords.com/county/polk#:~:text=The%20Polk%20County%20Tax%20Assessor,Sales%20history%20information)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Reach out in person if possible, focusing on practical assurances (e.g., minimal traffic or visual impact). A neighborly approach addressing everyday concerns can help gain their understanding.

overview_summary: All three profiled neighboring landowners have no documented stance on the development (3 "unknown"). None are high-profile community figures – all are assessed with low local influence. This suggests minimal organized influence from these immediate neighbors.
